articles.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
articles.excerpt: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
articles.what_this_means: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

articles.title: England Women's T20 World Cup Squad 2025: Sciver-Brunt Leads
articles.what_this_means: England has named its T20 World Cup squad with Sciver-Brunt as captain and exciting new talent Corteen-Coleman included, while veteran Wyatt-Hodge returns for her eighth World Cup campaign. The balanced squad suggests competitive cricket ahead, and we've broken down exactly how to catch all the action from the US.

articles.title: Bhuvneshwar Leads Purple Cap Race: IPL 2025 Live Updates
articles.what_this_means: Bhuvneshwar Kumar is dominating the Purple Cap race with an exceptional 3-wicket haul against Delhi Capitals, while Virat Kohli's resurgence continues as he moves into the top 4 run-scorers in IPL 2025. RCB's combination of explosive batting and death bowling puts them in playoff contention.

articles.title: Geoff Allott Named NZC Chief: What It Means for India Cricket 2026
articles.what_this_means: Geoff Allott, a former New Zealand pace bowler, takes over as NZC CEO, replacing Scott Weenink. This leadership change signals better strategic planning for New Zealand cricket, making them tougher opponents for India in 2026 bilateral series and ICC tournaments like the Champions Trophy 2025. Indian cricket fans in the US should expect more organized, competitive Kiwi teams ahead.

articles.title: Aakhri Sawal Trailer Releases April 30: Sanjay Dutt's New Bollywood Movie 2025
articles.what_this_means: Sanjay Dutt's Aakhri Sawal trailer drops April 30, 2025, revealing an ambitious historical drama about RSS history. The film is expected to stream on Prime Video or Hotstar after its theatrical run—a must-watch for Indian diaspora seeking quality Bollywood content with cultural significance.

articles.title: Madhu Mantena & Ira Trivedi Welcome Baby Boy Neel Chaitanya
articles.what_this_means: Bollywood producer Madhu Mantena and his wife Ira Trivedi welcomed their first child, a baby boy named Neel Chaitanya Mantena, celebrating with a traditional namkaran ceremony. This heartwarming moment reflects how Indian families maintain cultural traditions while embracing modern parenthood in the diaspora.
